metadata.title: TacDent | Modern Dental Clinic
metadata.description: Book appointments, explore services, and discover gentle modern dental care.

footer.description: Gentle, modern dentistry for families. Your smile is our priority.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Healthy smiles start with trusted care
hero.description: From routine checkups to advanced treatments, our team combines modern technology with a calm, friendly experience.
hero.imageAlt: Modern dental clinic with friendly staff

team.title: Experienced Team
team.text: Dentists and hygienists focused on comfort and clear communication.

equipment.title: Modern Equipment
equipment.text: Digital imaging and precise tools for faster, safer treatments.

booking.title: Easy Booking
booking.text: Request appointments online and manage them from one place.

general.title: General Dentistry
general.description: Preventive exams, cleanings, and personalized care plans.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Treatments
cosmetic.description: Whitening, veneers, and smile makeovers that look natural.

family.title: Family Friendly
family.description: Comfortable visits for kids, teens, and adults alike.

1.quote: The team made me feel calm from the moment I walked in. Best dental experience I've had.
1.name: Sarah M.

2.quote: Booking online was easy, and the appointment reminder saved me from forgetting my visit.
2.name: James L.

3.quote: Professional, gentle, and transparent about every step. Highly recommend TacDent.
3.name: Ayşe K.

cta.title: Ready for your next visit?
cta.description: Book online in under a minute. Our team will confirm your appointment and send a reminder before your visit.

services.label: Services
services.title: Treatments for every stage of care
services.description: From preventive visits to advanced procedures, we explain every option in plain language so you can choose with confidence.
services.empty: Start the backend API to load live services, or check back soon.

1.name: General Checkup
1.description: Comprehensive oral exam, cleaning, and preventive care.

2.name: Teeth Whitening
2.description: Professional whitening for a brighter, confident smile.

3.name: Dental Implants
3.description: Permanent tooth replacement with natural-looking results.

4.name: Orthodontics
4.description: Clear aligners and braces for straighter teeth.

5.name: Emergency Care
5.description: Same-day relief for pain, breaks, and urgent issues.

about.label: About TacDent
about.title: Care that feels human, not clinical
about.description: TacDent was founded on a simple idea: dental visits should be calm, transparent, and tailored to you. We combine modern technology with a warm team that listens first.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: We are here to help
contact.description: Questions about a treatment or your upcoming visit? Reach out anytime.
contact.emergencyText: For urgent pain or trauma outside regular hours, call our emergency line at

appointments.label: Appointments
appointments.title: Book a visit
appointments.description: Request a new appointment and our team will contact you by phone to confirm your preferred date and time.

form.title: Book an appointment
form.description: Fill in your details and pick a preferred date and time.
